title: Default user with WorkForms
excerpt:
How is the default user determined when using WorkForms? 
WorkForms seems to default to a specific user which is causing confusion on our team: 
 
How can the default user be changed?

posts.author: justinb (Justin Beckner)
posts.cookedHtml:
How is the default user determined when using WorkForms?

WorkForms seems to default to a specific user which is causing confusion on our team:

How can the default user be changed?

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml: If the submitter of the form is not a board member, the creator of the form will be marked as the submitter
